#!/bin/bash

# Ethical Assistant - Production Launcher for Customers
# Instructions below for Windows and Linux/Mac users

echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo "Ethical Assistant Recorder - First Time Setup"
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
echo ""
echo "IMPORTANT: Before running for the first time, follow these steps:"
echo ""
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
echo "For Linux / Mac Users:"
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
echo ""
echo "Step 1: Open Terminal and navigate to this folder"
echo "  $ cd /path/to/ethical_assistant_cpp_demo_bundle"
echo ""
echo "Step 2: Make the script executable by running:"
echo "  $ chmod +x run_recorder.sh"
echo ""
echo "Step 3: Run the recorder:"
echo "  $ ./run_recorder.sh"
echo ""
echo "That's it! The script will automatically:"
echo "  ✓ Create a recordings folder in your home directory"
echo "  ✓ Set up all paths correctly"
echo "  ✓ Launch the recorder UI"
echo ""
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
echo "For Windows Users:"
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
echo ""
echo "Option 1: Using Windows Terminal (PowerShell)"
echo "  1. Right-click the folder and select 'Open in Terminal' or 'Open PowerShell here'"
echo "  2. Run: .\run_recorder.sh"
echo ""
echo "Option 2: Using Command Prompt (cmd.exe)"
echo "  1. Open Command Prompt"
echo "  2. Navigate to folder: cd C:\path\to\ethical_assistant_cpp_demo_bundle"
echo "  3. Run: ethical_assistant_demo.exe"
echo ""
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
echo ""
echo "If you get a permission error on Linux/Mac:"
echo "  The fix is simple: run this command ONE TIME:"
echo "  $ chmod +x run_recorder.sh"
echo ""
echo "Then you can use: ./run_recorder.sh"
echo ""
echo "═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════"
